title: Thai Chicken Tacos
description: A unique fusion dish that combines the flavors of Thai cuisine with the classic Mexican taco. This recipe is perfect for adventurous foodies looking to try something new.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the red curry paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
Add the coconut milk, fish sauce, lime juice, cumin, and chili powder.
Stir to combine and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and cook for 10-15 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by placing a portion of the chicken mixture onto a tortilla, followed by some shredded lettuce and diced tomatoes.
